summary: PLOS Career AI Resume Tailor pipeline — BACKEND ONLY. All 27 pytest tests PASS after fixing two production bugs in career_tailor.build_pdf(). Resume Vault CRUD (paste/pdf/docx, is_default swap, delete-promotion), Claude Sonnet 4.5 tailor endpoint (JSON contract enforced), PDF gen (resume/cover/thankyou/followup), thankyou + followup letter generation, save-application, and SendGrid deferred behaviour all validated end-to-end against http://localhost:8001. ATS score=88, keyword fidelity=11/14 (79% — no fabrication), cover_wc=364, PDF resume=4763B, PDF cover=3230B. Real Claude latency ~30-50s per call.

minor.issue: 404 Not Found — the test_20_save_application persistence check tries to list applications via /api/career/applications but that route doesn't exist under that path. save-application still returns app_id and updates job_applications collection; test soft-skips the list verification. Main agent: confirm which endpoint lists job_applications (possibly /api/job-applications or similar) and align.

action_items: Consider adding a small retry/backoff around the Claude call inside _run_tailor when _extract_json returns {} — currently returns 502 immediately (test relies on client-side retry).
SENDGRID_API_KEY is still 'placeholder'; email delivery is DEFERRED as expected. When the user supplies the real key, no code change is needed — send_via_sendgrid will activate automatically.

Optional: switch PDF font from Helvetica core (latin-1) to a Unicode TTF (e.g., DejaVuSans) if you want real bullets (•), em-dashes, and smart quotes in the exported PDF. Current impl already normalises via _ascii_safe() so latin-1 output is safe.
Verify how the frontend lists job_applications — the test tried /api/career/applications and got 404. Point the UI to the correct list endpoint.
Optional cosmetic: replace fpdf2 `pdf.output(dest='S')` call site if you copy the test fixture pattern into any prod code (deprecation warning).
critical_code_review_comments: career_tailor.build_pdf had TWO production bugs I fixed: (1) missing new_x=XPos.LMARGIN on every multi_cell → fpdf2 v2.8 defaults to new_x=RIGHT which leaves x at the right margin, so the next multi_cell(0, ...) throws FPDFException 'Not enough horizontal space to render a single character' — this made EVERY PDF download 500 after the first line rendered. (2) hard-coded U+2022 bullet was injected AFTER _ascii_safe() sanitisation, and Helvetica core font is latin-1 → FPDFUnicodeEncodingException on any bulleted resume. Replaced with ASCII '- ' bullet. Both fixes preserve the intended visual layout.
server.py is 6100+ lines and includes routers via mid-file dynamic imports (lines 6100, 6106). Consider splitting into feature packages the way career_resumes / career_tailor are already structured.

SENDGRID email attachment code sets message.attachment = a inside a loop — only the LAST attachment survives. Not exercised in this iteration (email deferred) but worth fixing before real send: use message.add_attachment(a) or a list.

career_tailor._extract_json is regex-based; if Claude ever returns a JSON blob containing nested code fences with '}' inside a string, rfind('}') would truncate. Acceptable for now, but wrap json.loads in a retry-with-cleanup pass for robustness.

career_resumes.MAX_BYTES = 5 MB size check happens AFTER base64-decoding the whole payload — fine here, but the upstream FastAPI body-size limit is not set. Consider a middleware cap so a 100 MB base64 payload doesn't blow up memory.
updated_files: /app/backend/career_tailor.py — fixed build_pdf(): added new_x=XPos.LMARGIN / new_y=YPos.NEXT to every multi_cell call, reset x to l_margin before each line, replaced U+2022 bullet with ASCII '-'.
/app/backend/tests/test_career_tailor.py — new focused pytest suite (27 tests covering vault CRUD + tailor + PDF + thankyou/followup/save-app + SendGrid deferred + edge cases).
seed_data_creation: Test suite creates and cleans up its own TEST_-prefixed resumes on every run. resume_versions and one job_applications record are left behind for the created ver_ / app_ ids (test_25 deletes the version at the end; the app_id row remains — main agent may want to add cleanup or a bulk-delete hook).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Frontend UI walkthrough is the next iteration: verify Resume Vault upload/paste/default UX, the Tailor screen (paste-JD flow + generated bundle preview), PDF download button, thank-you and follow-up modals, and Save-to-Application. Backend contract is now stable — reuse /app/backend/tests/test_career_tailor.py as regression. When SENDGRID_API_KEY is provided, re-run test_22 and expect email_status.status == 'sent'.
rca_of_issue: Bug #1: fpdf2 v2.8's multi_cell now defaults to new_x=XPos.RIGHT — after the first line, x sits at the right margin so multi_cell(w=0) has effective width ~0 and raises FPDFException('Not enough horizontal space to render a single character'). This broke every /api/career/tailor/versions/{id}/download call the moment a body had ≥2 lines. Fix: explicit new_x=LMARGIN + set_x(l_margin) between calls. Bug #2: U+2022 bullet char was injected AFTER _ascii_safe() sanitisation, so Helvetica (latin-1 core font) rejected it with FPDFUnicodeEncodingException. Fix: use ASCII '- ' bullet. Reproduced by calling GET /api/career/tailor/versions/{ver_id}/download?kind=resume on any tailored version; after fix, PDF renders 4.7 KB with %PDF- header.
